headline: 'Dean Of Valuation' Aswath Damodaran Warns Private Credit Is 'Setting Itself Up For A Beating' Amid AI Data Center Lending Boom
summary: NYU finance professor Aswath Damodaran slammed private credit lenders funding the artificial intelligence data-center boom, warning that the rapidly growing industry is becoming increasingly reckless as capital floods into the sector. Speaking in an interview with Lumida Wealth Management released...

headline: Blackstone (BX) Launches SablePointe As It Plans $30 Billion Japan AI Data Centers
summary: Blackstone (NYSE:BX) has launched SablePointe Credit Strategies, an asset based lending platform focused on secured credit. The company plans to invest $30b in AI focused data centers in Japan as part of its digital infrastructure push. Blackstone has appointed Carey S. Roberts as Senior Managing Director and General Counsel, Real Estate. Blackstone, trading at around $115.4, is rolling out these initiatives after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock down 27.3% year to date...

headline: Blackstone (BX) Stock After 27% Slide Is The Recent Drop Creating An Opening
summary: If you are wondering whether Blackstone at around US$115.40 is starting to look like value or still has more to fall, the stock's recent moves give some useful clues. The share price has fallen 6.8% over the past week, is down 2.2% over the last month and has declined 27.3% year to date, although the 3 year and 5 year returns of 36.2% and 40.2% show a very different picture. Recent headlines around Blackstone have focused on its role as a major global alternative asset manager, touching on...
